en_title: The Steam Deck's Demand Has Reportedly Cratered
cn_title: Steam Deck需求据称暴跌，销量同比下滑82%
subtitle: 涨价后需求骤降

paragraphs.en: For years, the Steam Deck was essentially a budget all-star among handheld gaming PCs , even when more powerful handhelds like the Xbox Ally X started coming out. But, in the months following Valve's price increase for its handheld, it seems like demand for the Steam Deck has absolutely cratered.
paragraphs.cn: 多年来，即便XBOX Ally X等性能更强的掌机陆续推出，Steam Deck仍堪称手持游戏PC中的性价比明星。但在Valve为这款掌机涨价后的几个月里，Steam Deck的需求似乎已经彻底崩塌。

paragraphs.en: Right now, it looks like the Steam Deck is selling up to 82% fewer units than it did last year, according to some napkin math done by Boiling Steam (via Gizmodo ). The blog is based on the Steam Deck slipping from a near-constant 5th-place on the Steam top sellers chart down to around #14, which is theoretically a massive 72% drop in revenue.
paragraphs.cn: 根据Boiling Steam（经Gizmodo转述）的粗略估算，Steam Deck目前销量最多比去年减少82%。该博客的推算依据是，Steam Deck在Steam畅销榜上的排名从长期接近第5位滑落至约第14位，理论上意味着收入大幅下降72%。

paragraphs.en: Obviously, these aren't official numbers, and it's unlikely that Valve will ever actually share exactly how many Steam Decks its selling these days. Either way, though, it's not exactly surprising that the Steam Deck isn't moving as fast as it used to. At its new price of $789, the than some of its competitors like the Xbox Ally or the Lenovo Legion Go S – unless you're really attached to the Deck's haptic trackpads.
paragraphs.cn: 显然，这些并非官方数据，Valve大概也不会公布如今Steam Deck的确切销量。无论如何，它卖得不如以前快并不令人意外。新售价达到789美元(约合人民币5349元)后，[原文此处缺失内容]XBOX Ally或Lenovo Legion Go S等竞品——除非你特别钟爱Steam Deck的触觉触控板。

paragraphs.en: However, there is a chance that the Steam Deck may grow more popular again. Valve is far from the only company raising prices on its handhelds, and if devices like the white Xbox Ally go up in price, the Steam Deck will start being competitive again. Then again, there's going to be some amount of people that won't be able to afford Valve's prices even if there aren't any cheaper options.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Steam Deck仍有可能重新走红。Valve远非唯一提高掌机价格的公司，如果白色XBOX Ally等设备也涨价，Steam Deck将再次具备竞争力。话虽如此，即使市场上没有更便宜的选择，仍会有一部分人无法负担Valve的价格。

paragraphs.en: One thing that's for sure, though, is that prices aren't going to improve soon. Valve itself came out and said that retail prices are lagging behind supplier prices by a few months, and the Xbox Series X just got another price increase , scheduled for August. And with Microsoft suggesting that prices for memory are going to end up being five times what they once were , there are almost definitely more price increases right around the corner.
paragraphs.cn: 可以确定的是，价格短期内不会好转。Valve自己表示，零售价格比供应商价格变化滞后数月；XBOX Series X也刚刚宣布将在8月再次涨价。微软还暗示内存价格最终会达到过去的五倍，因此新一轮涨价几乎肯定近在眼前。

summary: Boiling Steam估算Steam Deck销量较去年最多下滑82%，其Steam畅销榜排名从第5位附近跌至约第14位，理论收入降幅达72%。涨价至789美元(约合人民币5,349元)后，设备竞争力受到明显影响。
opus_summary: Steam Deck曾是掌机市场的性价比明星，但涨价后需求据称急剧下滑。若竞争对手继续跟进涨价，它或许能重新获得优势；只是面对持续攀升的内存和供应成本，整个市场短期内都难有便宜选择。
